minimal: minimalist flat design, restrained, generous negative space, one or two colors, timeless and simple
geometric: precise geometric construction on a grid, balanced symmetry, clean angles and arcs, confident modern mark
gradient: modern smooth gradient fills, tasteful two-tone color blend, contemporary and polished
glow: soft luminous glow, subtle light bloom around the mark, sleek modern tech aesthetic
flow: flowing continuous curves, smooth ribbon-like strokes, sense of motion and momentum
modern: modern gradient fills with a soft luminous glow and flowing continuous curves, premium tech-brand feel, sleek and confident
line: clean single-weight monoline art, elegant and simple, consistent stroke width
badge: vintage emblem badge, circular lockup, refined retro craftsmanship, crest-like detail
3d: soft 3D depth with gentle shadows and highlights, tactile material feel, dimensional but clean
mesh: vibrant gradient mesh, colorful modern blend, smooth luminous transitions
duotone: bold duotone treatment, two strong brand colors, high contrast, striking
corporate: clean professional corporate identity, trustworthy, balanced, understated confidence
